title: Proclamation No. 1143, s. 2006
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 1143

CREATING AND DESIGNATING THREE PARCELS OF LAND OF THE PRIVATE DOMAIN SITUATED IN BARANGAY BIÑANG, BIÑAN, LAGUNA, AS INCLUSIONS TO THE EXISTING LAGUNA TECHNOPARK I SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7916, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8748

Pursuant to the powers vested in me under Republic Act No. 7916, otherwise known as the Special Economic Zone Act of 1995, as amended and upon the recommendation of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , President of the Republic of the Philippines, by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, do hereby create and designate, subject to the provisions of Republic Act No. 7916 as amended, its Implementing Rules and Regulations, and Resolution No. 06-259 dated 13 June 2006, of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority three (3) parcels of land with an aggregate area of 2.4375 hectares, located at Barangay Biñang, Biñan, Laguna, for inclusion to the existing Laguna Technopark I Special Economic Zone (LTI I-SEZ), as defined by the following technical descriptions:

Lot 3, Block 4 TCT NO. 155752 Pcs-04-005875

A parcel of land (Lot 3, Block 4 of the consolidation-subdivision plan Pcs-04-005875, being a portion of the consolidation of Lots 2716, 2717, Biñan Estate, 2710-A, 2710-B, 2710-J, Psd-04-026379, 2710-I-1, 2710-I-2, 2710-I-3, Psd-04-038037, Lots 1-7, Pcs-04-003945 and Lots 1-6, Pcs-04-003956, LRC Record No. 8374), situated in Barrio of Biñang, Municipality of Biñan, Province of Laguna.

Bounded on the SW., along line 1-2 by Lot 2; on the NW., along line 2-3 by Lot 11 (Easement); on the NE., along line 3-4 by Lot 4, all of Block 4; and on the SE., along line 4-1 by Road Lot 6 (20.00 m. wide); all of the consolidation-subdivision plan.

Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 06 deg. 27’E., 1567.84 m. from Mon. No. 23, Biñan Estate;

beginning, containing an area of EIGHTEEN THOUSAND SEVEN HUNDRED FIFTY (18,750) SQUARE METERS . All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.S. cyl. conc. mons. 15×60 cm., bearings true; date of original survey, January 1906 – February 1907 and that of the consolidation subdivision survey, March 1-30, 1989 and was approved on September 24, 1991.

Lot 11-B TCT NO. 155753 Psd-043405-072268

A parcel of land (Lot 11-B of the subdivision plan Psd-043405-072268, being a portion of Lot 11, Block 4, Pcs-04-005875, LRC Record No. 8374), situated in Barangay of Biñang, Municipality of Biñan, Province of Laguna.

Bounded on the SE., along line 1-2 by Lot 3, Block 4, Pcs-04-005875; on the SW., along line 2-3 by Lot 11-A of the subdivision plan; on the NW., along line 3-4 by Lot 8, Block 4, Pcs-04-005875; of the NE., along line 4-1 by Lot 11-C of the subdivision plan.

Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 06 deg. 32’E., 1763.09 m. from Mon. No. 23, Biñan Estate;

beginning, containing an area of SIX HUNDRED TWENTY FIVE (625) SQUARE METERS . All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.S. cyl. conc. mons. 15×60 cm; bearings true; date of original survey, January 1906 – February 1907 and that of the subdivision survey, June 11, 1994 and was approved on June 22, 1994.

Lot 4-A TCT NO. 155754 Psd-043403-075255

A parcel of land (Lot 4-A of the subdivision plan Psd-043403-075255, being a portion of Lot 4, Block 4, Pcs-04-005875, LRC Record No. 8374), situated in Barangay of Biñang, Municipality of Biñan, Province of Laguna.

Bounded on the SW., along line 1-2 by Lot 3; on the NW., along line 2-3 by Lot 91-C, Psd-043403-072268 (Easement 5:00 m. wide); beyond Lot 9, both of Block 4, Pcs-04-005875; on the NE., along line 3-4 by Lot 4-B of the subdivision plan; on the SE., along line 4-1 by Road. Lot 6, Psd-04005875 (20.00 m. wide).

Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 09 deg. 49’E., 1649.65 m. from Mon. No. 23, Biñan Estate;

beginning, containing an area of FIVE THOUSAND (5,000) SQUARE METERS . All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.S. cyl. conc. mons. 15×60 cm; point 1 and 3 by -Old PS., bearings true; date of original survey, January 1906 – February 1907 and that of the subdivision survey, August 2, 1994 and was approved on October 14, 1994.

IN WITNESS THEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 20th day of September, in the year of our Lord, Two Thousand and Six.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

By the President: (Sgd.) EDUARDO R. ERMITA Executive Secretary

Source : CDAsia
